The build quality feels premium, it's not hollow, the body has a matte finish so it's nice to hold, the cable is also braided. However, the layout is quite wide, which is a bit difficult for those with small hands, and unfortunately the D-pad is not the best for your thumbs if you use it for too long, because the sharp edges and the cross shape become a bit loose at an angle, your thumbs will feel sore if you keep sliding around pressing the D-pad, especially since I'm a negative person who uses this controller to play wrestling games.
